mRNA processing in eukaryotes
1) modification of 5’ end – addition of 7mG “cap” in 5’ to 5’ linkage
2) modification of 3’ end – cleavage at polyadenylation site
addition of poly-A tail
mRNA = “poly-A+ RNA”
3) splicing – remove introns, splice together exons

Splicing – the big picture
intron = intervening sequence (removed)
exon = exits the nucleus

Exon 1
Exon 2
Donor
Acceptor
Donor = junction between 3’ end of exon and 5’ end of intron
Acceptor = junction between 3’ end of intron and 5’ end of next exon
Splicesome = ribonuclear protein complex
